creator: andrews@TECHNOLOGIST.COM
text:
Forgot *_DEPENDS stuff:

On 09-Oct-99 Will Andrews wrote:
> XMASTER_SITES=       
http://hellblazer.dhis.org/projects/wmthemeinstall/download/

RUN_DEPENDS=    wmaker:${PORTSDIR}/x11-wm/windowmaker
LIB_DEPENDS=    gtk12.2:${PORTSDIR}/x11-toolkits/gtk12 \
                Xpm.4:${PORTSDIR}/graphics/xpm

> XMAINTAINER=  andrews@technologist.com
> X
> XGTK_CONFIG?= ${PREFIX}/bin/gtk12-config
> XUSE_X_PREFIX=        YES

Sorry about that... (note: don't copy and paste as-is from the mail message, as
my mail client [soon to be replaced] doesn't send the tabs as tabs but rather
as spaces). :\

--
Will Andrews <andrews@technologist.com>
